## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog articles now account for 2.5% of overall traffic within one month of indexing; aiming for 5-10% growth](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [78 articles indexed so far; \~10-15 articles performing well, with a mix of design and development topics](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Contentful Builder blog post generated a lead, suggesting comparison articles are effective](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [New V2 workflow implemented, including fact-checking and more comprehensive research processes](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [2.5% of overall traffic from blog articles within one month of indexing](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [78 articles indexed; 10-15 performing well (mix of design and development topics)](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Contentful Builder blog post generated a lead; focus on comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Upcoming comparisons: Sanity vs. Webflow, DataCMS vs. WordPress, HubSpot vs. Builder.io](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Implementing fact-checking workflow for middle/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [New set of refreshes launched (5 more articles)](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [V2 workflow includes:](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
      - [Internal linking (sourced from sitemap XML)](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [External linking to credible, non-competitive sources](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Deeper keyword research and content outline development](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Manual input for word count and section structure](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Post-processing (details to be provided by CTO Daniel)](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Customization for outlines, including manual review and addition of unique sections](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Flexibility for combined human and AI input in content generation](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Hyperlink anchor text visibility issue on the frontend (known issue, being addressed)](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Google Discover Performance

  - [Spike in visibility for "Modern Website Design" article on September 19-20](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Google Discover explained:](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [Appears in Google app news feed](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [Content recommendation based on user engagement and search history](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
      - [Requires high-quality images, non-clickbait titles, and evergreen/trending topics](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [Performance tied to user engagement, not directly related to search engine rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule knowledge transfer call with CTO Daniel to discuss workflow details](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Andrej to send an update and prepare new batch of topics focusing on well-performing areas](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Devon to review new topics in Airtable when available](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Jimmy to provide an update on workflow setup progress](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing content performance, especially comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Address hyperlink visibility issue on the frontend](https://fathom.video/share/Hb7tp9zHMiJDB9VXK7QKMg3AQcesXB_Q?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
